title: Verify Engagement Content Logic
description: Test the logic for the 'Engagement' section, ensuring it shows resume-watching content first, then recommendations.
preconditions: User is in the experiment cohort.
Test User A has watched 50% of a movie.
Test User B has watched 95% of a movie.

steps.description: 1. Log in as User A and navigate to the Trial Corner.
3. Log out and log in as User B and navigate to the Trial Corner.

expected_result: For User A, the 'Engagement' section shows the movie they are halfway through, with an option to 'Resume'. For User B, it shows the top 1 content in a similar genre, as their previous content consumption is >90%.
